title: TPS Lean Kaizen Recommendations
description: TPS Lean agent's improvement findings and A3-structured recommendations. Informational only — never blocks finalize.

scope_period.description: Period the review covered. Either YYYY-MM (a single month) or YYYY-Qn (a quarter — used by the quarterly sweep).

target_artifacts.description: Repo-relative paths the review examined. Lets Reviewer and the dashboard show which surfaces this run touched.

summary.description: One-paragraph plain-English executive summary of the kaizen punch list. Used by Coordinator and the dashboard.

lean_metrics.description: Headline empirical metrics. Each value corresponds to a claim_id in the sibling work_product.json; this object is the human-readable rollup, not the source of truth.

severity.description: Informational severity. HIGH = active dysfunction. MED = drift worth addressing. LOW = note for the file. None block finalize.

waste_category.description: 8 wastes (DOWNTIME) plus pull-flow-specific categories produced by lean-pull-flow-review.

evidence_claim_id.description: Claim id in the sibling work_product.json that supports this finding.

target_artifact.description: Repo-relative path of the artifact this finding is about (or a db: prefix for live db, e.g. db:tasks).

problem_statement.description: What is wrong, in the present tense. No hedge prose.

root_cause_hypothesis.description: Why it is happening. Marked as a hypothesis — the CFO confirms or rejects before acting.

countermeasure.description: What to do. Concrete, actionable, ideally one change.

expected_impact.description: Quantified expected delta (e.g. '-2 days flow time', '+15% VA ratio', 'WIP per assignee ≤ 3'). If you cannot quantify, write an open_question on the work_product instead.

owner_role.description: Role responsible for implementing. Free-text to allow non-agent roles (e.g. 'cfo', 'fpa_manager').

target_complete_date.description: ISO date the countermeasure should be in place. Required for HIGH-severity recommendations.

open_questions.description: Anything the agent could not answer with confidence and needs CFO input on. Mirrors work_product.open_questions.
